7.solution:
Stmt I: A/(B+C+D)=K ‚Üí A=KS/(1+K). Solutions: A=B=C=D ‚Üí K=1/3; or S=0 ‚Üí K=‚ąí1. Sum=‚ąí2/3 ‚úď.

9.solution:
Men-black=4a, women-red=9a; men-red=5b, women-black=4b.
‚Üí (4a+4b):(5b+9a)=20:33 ‚Üí 132a+132b=100b+180a ‚Üí b=3a/2.
With a=2, b=3: men=4(2)+5(3)=23; women=9(2)+4(3)=30. Ratio=23:30.
Answer: A (23:30).

10.solution:
